title: ifixai Adversarial Corpus
description: Schema for tests/b<NN>_<slug>/corpus.yaml. Used only by B12 (prompt injection), B14 (covert side task), B30 (malicious deployer rules). Each corpus is a flat list of taxonomy-tagged payloads from which the rotator draws a seeded sample.

version.description: Optional version tag for the corpus. Used by version_enforcement to detect drift.

id.description: Stable identifier across runs; used in test_case_id to attribute scores per payload.

category.description: Taxonomy bucket; the rotator stratifies sampling by category.

payload.description: Literal string sent to the model under test.
